docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESTOM, OMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EQUIFAX INC. $1,860.00 PRINCIPAL, $184.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,044.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $1860 PLUS COSTS FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NADIA REYNAGA-MORENO, LEGAL SUPPORT LEAD. DEFENDANT DECLINES STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
